claim_boundary: Synthetic software and experimental-design evidence only; no empirical Daphnia forecast skill, GT01/G1 qualification, or external endorsement.

claims.text: EvoForecast is a synthetic digital wind tunnel for testing experimental-design informativeness before scale-up.
claims.uncertainty_or_missingness: No real laboratory outcomes are present.

claims.text: The latest blind package completed 5,600/5,600 SLiM trajectories with 0 failures.
claims.uncertainty_or_missingness: Execution success is software evidence, not forecast skill.

claims.text: In blind v5, 0/60 prospective cells met the indicative ≥50% joint gate.
claims.uncertainty_or_missingness: The definition is scenario- and threshold-specific.

claims.text: Across blind-v5 phase cells, 1/80 met the indicative gate and 0/80 met the robust gate.
claims.uncertainty_or_missingness: The sole indicative cell is a day-90 nowcast, not prospective evidence.

claims.text: Blind v3 had 5/80 indicative cells and 0/80 robust cells.
claims.uncertainty_or_missingness: Blind-v3 and blind-v5 are different synthetic challenge packages.

claims.text: No blind-v5 policy was classified robustly Pareto optimal: 0/120.
claims.uncertainty_or_missingness: Some policies are conditional/fragile; none satisfy the robust classification.

claims.text: The blind-v5 GP1 summary reports a 47.5% mean CRPS gain versus P1 with 80% nominal-90% coverage.
claims.uncertainty_or_missingness: Aggregate gain coexists with no prospective phase cell meeting the indicative gate.

claims.text: R1 adds 0.0% mean CRPS gain beyond GP1 in blind v5.
claims.uncertainty_or_missingness: This is specific to the synthetic challenge and registered comparator.

claims.text: The corrected favorable control shows a 17.0% genome-versus-pedigree CRPS gain.
claims.uncertainty_or_missingness: Favourable marker-encoded synthetic software control only; not DNA value in biology.

claims.forbidden_wording: genomic data are harmful in biology
claims.text: The matched adverse control shows a -9.2% genome-versus-pedigree CRPS gain.
claims.uncertainty_or_missingness: A negative control demonstrates that the workflow can expose failure.

claims.text: The earlier RC01 synthetic POC verified 3,076 immutable jobs.
claims.uncertainty_or_missingness: Execution count is software evidence; biological validation remains blocked.

claims.forbidden_wording: implemented or calibrated Daphnia genome model
claims.text: The proposed GT01 theoretical cutaway uses diploid, ten-chromosome, sexual recombination and standing variation.
claims.uncertainty_or_missingness: GT01 is gated and does not alter the frozen clonal RC01 production model.

claims.allowed_wording: registered software boundary for this round
claims.forbidden_wording: Python simulates the biological reference world
claims.text: SLiM 5.2 is the registered biological trajectory engine for this round; Python orchestrates, exports, and scores.
claims.uncertainty_or_missingness: This site performs lookup only and contains no simulator.

claims.forbidden_wording: a committed or endorsed programme budget
claims.text: An illustrative large-programme budget on the order of tens of millions of pounds, used as external context only, not a committed budget or an engine recommendation.
claims.uncertainty_or_missingness: No authoritative budget source is embedded in this bundle.

claims.text: Empirical qualification has not been achieved.
claims.uncertainty_or_missingness: Requires controlled material, accepted evidence, real assays, custody, independent prospective reveal, and external reproduction.

claims.text: V3–V5 describe software and challenge-design maturation, not biological generations.
claims.uncertainty_or_missingness: Cohorts differ in registered synthetic design and scoring treatment.

claims.text: The earlier RC01 synthetic POC verified 12,304 run-horizon endpoint records.
claims.uncertainty_or_missingness: Records are synthetic endpoints at four registered horizons.

do_not_say: a committed or endorsed programme budget
Python simulates the biological reference world
genomic data are harmful in biology
implemented or calibrated Daphnia genome model
